title: Birdeye budget-aware runtime control
summary: Add adaptive Birdeye budget control with per-cycle request/429/success metrics, burst-aware budget mode (healthy/constrained/starved), endpoint backoff + global cooldown + same-cycle retry suppression on 429, budget-gated discovery/enrichment, and persisted observability fields in cycle/status artifacts.
why_safe: No new external endpoints/calls were introduced; control only adapts behavior around existing Birdeye calls.
429 handling now applies endpoint exponential backoff, global cooldown, and disables retries in the same runtime cycle to prevent retry storms.
Budget telemetry is additive and persisted in discovery summary/cycle summary/status without changing trading strategy logic.
commit_message: Add budget-aware Birdeye runtime controls and backoff safety
notes_for_cursor: Field path map for budget control: Birdeye request outcomes -> budget_snapshot (requests/429/success/mode/reason/endpoints_disabled) -> discover_candidates summary -> trader cycle_summary -> status.json. Discovery now applies budget-adjusted limits and endpoint gating; run_cycle applies budget-aware effective_discovery_interval_seconds.
